units.source_text: 1 以現⾦形式發放的固定薪酬為即時⽀付。
units.translation_target_text: 1 Fixed remuneration paid in cash is paid immediately.
units.translation_en: 1 Fixed remuneration paid in cash is paid immediately.

layout_variants.display_en: 1 Fixed remuneration paid in cash is paid immediately.

units.source_text: 2 以滙豐股份形式⽀付。就執⾏董事⽽⾔及在法例規定的情況下，實際授出的股份設有不超過⼀年的禁售期。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Payment is in HSBC shares. In the case of executive directors and where required by law, shares actually granted are subject to a lock-up period not exceeding one year.
units.translation_en: 2 Payment is in HSBC shares. In the case of executive directors and where required by law, shares actually granted are subject to a lock-up period not exceeding one year.

units.source_text: 3 就2025年授出的浮動酬勞。根據股東於2024年5⽉3⽇作出的批准（99%贊成），並在監管規定許可的情況下，各承受重⼤風險⼈員任何⼀年薪酬之浮動部分不得
units.translation_target_text: 3 For variable remuneration awarded in 2025. In accordance with the approval of shareholders on May 3, 2024 (99% in favor), and subject to regulatory requirements, the floating portion of the remuneration of each person who bears significant risks in any year shall not be

units.source_text: 超過薪酬總額中固定部分的⼗倍，符合集團薪酬委員會批准的最⾼酬勞比率。在許可的情況下，滙豐控股有限公司繼續就受歐洲銀⾏管理局監管的實體（規限其各
units.translation_target_text: exceeds ten times the fixed portion of total remuneration, consistent with the maximum remuneration ratio approved by the Group Remuneration Committee. Where permitted, HSBC Holdings plc continues to provide

units.source_text: 承受重⼤風險⼈員的浮動酬勞不得超過薪酬總額中固定部分的200%）授予批准。
units.translation_target_text: Approval is granted (the variable remuneration of personnel who bear significant risks shall not exceed 200% of the fixed part of the total remuneration).
units.translation_en: Approval is granted (the variable remuneration of personnel who bear significant risks shall not exceed 200% of the fixed part of the total remuneration).

units.source_text: 4 28名已識別員⼯獲豁免應⽤審慎監管局及⾦融⾏為監管局薪酬規則下的承受重⼤風險⼈員薪酬結構規定。彼等的薪酬總額為930萬美元，當中800萬美元是固定酬
units.translation_target_text: 4 The 28 identified employees were exempted from the application of the pay structure requirements for persons with significant risk exposure under the Prudential Regulation Authority and Financial Conduct Authority remuneration rules. Their total remuneration was US$9.3 million, of which US$8.0 million was fixed compensation.
units.translation_en: 4 The 28 identified employees were exempted from the application of the pay structure requirements for persons with significant risk exposure under the Prudential Regulation Authority and Financial Conduct Authority remuneration rules. Their total remuneration was US$9.3 million, of which US$8.0 million was fixed compensation.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 4 The 28 identified employees were exempted from the application of the pay structure requirements for persons with significant risk exposure under the Prudential Regulation Authority and Financial Conduct Authority remuneration rules. Their total remuneration was US$9.3 million, of which US$8.0 million was fixed compensation.

units.source_text: 1 於2025年並無授予保證浮動薪酬。滙豐於特殊情況下會向新聘員⼯授予保證浮動薪酬，並僅就僱⽤的⾸年授予。此特殊情況⼀般涉及重要的新聘員⼯，並取決於多
units.translation_target_text: 1 No guaranteed variable remuneration is awarded in 2025. HSBC will grant guaranteed variable pay to newly hired employees under special circumstances and only for the first year of employment. This special situation typically involves important new hires and depends on
units.translation_en: 1 No guaranteed variable remuneration is awarded in 2025. HSBC will grant guaranteed variable pay to newly hired employees under special circumstances and only for the first year of employment. This special situation typically involves important new hires and depends on

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 No guaranteed variable remuneration is awarded in 2025. HSBC will grant guaranteed variable pay to newly hired employees under special circumstances and only for the first year of employment. This special situation typically involves important new hires and depends on

units.source_text: 項因素，如該員⼯的年資、該新聘員⼯候選⼈是否有其他獲聘機會，以及在業績計算年度內聘任該員⼯的時間。
units.translation_target_text: factors, such as the employee's seniority, whether the newly hired employee candidate has other employment opportunities, and the time when the employee was hired during the performance calculation year.
units.translation_en: factors, such as the employee's seniority, whether the newly hired employee candidate has other employment opportunities, and the time when the employee was hired during the performance calculation year.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: factors, such as the employee's seniority, whether the newly hired employee candidate has other employment opportunities, and the time when the employee was hired during the performance calculation year.

units.source_text: 2 包括代通知⾦、法定遣散費、轉職服務、法律費⽤、特惠⾦及和解費⽤等款項（不包括因終⽌合約⽽⽣效的既有福利權益）。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Including payments in lieu of notice, statutory severance pay, transition services, legal fees, ex-gratia payments and settlement fees (excluding existing welfare rights that take effect due to termination of the contract).
units.translation_en: 2 Including payments in lieu of notice, statutory severance pay, transition services, legal fees, ex-gratia payments and settlement fees (excluding existing welfare rights that take effect due to termination of the contract).
